question: Seliwanoff test and Xanthoproteic test are used for the identification of _ and _ respectively.
solution:
Seliwanoff test for ketose and Xenthoprotic test for proteins.

Seliwanoff's test is a chemical test which distinguishes between aldose and ketose sugars. If the sugar contains a ketone group, it is a ketose. If a sugar contains an aldehyde group, it is an aldose. This test relies on the principle that, when heated, ketoses are more rapidly dehydrated than aldoses.

solution:
Let N be the four digit number gcdN,18=3

Hence N is an odd integer which is divisible by 3 but not by 9.

4 digit odd multiples of 3

1005,1011,…,9999→1500

digit odd multiples of 9

1017,1035,…,9999→500

Hence number of such N=1500-500=1000

Then, tp=-16-12p-1

tq=-16-12q-1

The roots of the given quadratic equation 4x2-9x+5=0 is x=1,54. 

AM=54, GM=1 ∵AM≥GM

Now, given 54=tp+tq2,1=tptq

So, 1=256-12p+q-2⇒2p+q-2=-1p+q-228

⇒2p+q-10=-1p+q-2

It is equal when 2p+q-10=1=-1p+q-2

Hence, p+q-10=0⇒p+q=10
